title: Bharat Heavy Electricals is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bharat Heavy Electricals is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Heavy Electricals:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Heavy Electricals!
